---
name: RFC
about: Propose a significant design or architectural change
title: '[RFC] '
labels: rfc
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

One paragraph overview of the proposal.

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? Why now?

## Proposal

Describe the design at an appropriate level. Link to a document under `RFC/` if the write-up is long.

## Alternatives

What other options were considered?

## Impact

- README / vision
- Architecture docs
- Data formats
- Roadmap milestones

## Unresolved questions

What needs discussion before acceptance?

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) and [RFC/RFC-0001.md](../../RFC/RFC-0001.md) for the RFC process.
